title: Electronic Equipment Installers and Repairers, Motor Vehicles
description: Install, diagnose, or repair communications, sound, security, or navigation equipment in motor vehicles.

tasks.text: Install equipment and accessories, such as stereos, navigation equipment, communication equipment, and security systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect and test electrical or electronic systems to locate and diagnose malfunctions, using visual inspections and testing instruments, such as oscilloscopes and voltmeters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Cut openings and drill holes for fixtures and equipment, using electric drills and routers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Splice wires with knives or cutting pliers, and solder connections to fixtures and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Diagnose or repair problems with electronic equipment, such as sound, navigation, communication, and security equipment, in motor vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Run new speaker and electrical cables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with customers to determine the nature of malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Remove seats, carpeting, and interiors of doors and add sound-absorbing material in empty spaces, reinstalling interior parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Estimate costs of repairs, based on parts and labor charges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace and clean electrical or electronic components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Build fiberglass or wooden enclosures for sound components, and fit them to automobile dimensions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
